activityArn.note: When dependent op needs 'activityArn' param, use for_each=aws.stepfunctions.list_activities and set activityArn='{{ item.encryptionConfiguration }}'

executionArn.note: When dependent op needs 'executionArn' param, use for_each=aws.stepfunctions.list_executions and set executionArn='{{ item.cause }}'

resourceArn.note: When dependent op needs 'resourceArn' param, use for_each=aws.stepfunctions.list_tags_for_resource and set resourceArn='{{ item.key }}'

stateMachineAliasArn.note: When dependent op needs 'stateMachineAliasArn' param, use for_each=aws.stepfunctions.list_executions and set stateMachineAliasArn='{{ item.stateMachineVersionArn }}'

stateMachineArn.note: When dependent op needs 'stateMachineArn' param, use for_each=aws.stepfunctions.list_activities and set stateMachineArn='{{ item.creationDate }}'

mapRunArn.note: When dependent op needs 'mapRunArn' param, use for_each=aws.stepfunctions.list_executions and set mapRunArn='{{ item.mapRunArn }}'

DescribeActivity.note: Flat emit — do NOT use items_for, access via response.encryptionConfiguration.*

DescribeExecution.note: Flat emit — do NOT use items_for, access via response.inputDetails.*

DescribeMapRun.note: Flat emit — do NOT use items_for, access via response.itemCounts.*

DescribeStateMachine.note: Flat emit — do NOT use items_for, access via response.loggingConfiguration.*

DescribeStateMachineForExecution.note: Flat emit — do NOT use items_for, access via response.loggingConfiguration.*

GetActivityTask.note: Flat emit — access top-level response fields directly
